 # Lesson 02 Coding Guide

@@ -52,7 +52,7 @@ def on_message(bus, message, loop):
     return True
 &#96;&#96;&#96;

+Việc đặt &#96;_ = bus&#96; là để nói rằng tham số này chưa được dùng trong lesson.
 
 ### &#96;make_element(factory_name, name)&#96;
 
@@ -62,7 +62,7 @@ Mau viet:

     if not element:

+        raise RuntimeError(f"Không tạo được element: {factory_name}")

@@ -81,7 +81,7 @@ người mới học hay hỏi: "Chỉ có 1 source thì cần gì &#96;nvstreammux&#96;
 
 ## Extensions
 
-- Thu doi &#96;batch-size&#96; thanh 2 va ghi lai ban nghi muxer se cho dieu gi khi chi co 1 source.
-- Them source thu hai va request them &#96;sink_1&#96;.
-- Thu doi &#96;width&#96;/&#96;height&#96; va quan sat output cua muxer thay doi theo cach nao.
-- Ve lai pipeline bang tay, nhan manh doan request pad va doan static pad.
+- Thử đổi &#96;batch-size&#96; thành 2 và ghi lại bạn nghĩ muxer sẽ chờ điều gì khi chỉ có 1 source.
+- Thêm source thứ hai và request thêm &#96;sink_1&#96;.
+- Thử đổi &#96;width&#96;/&#96;height&#96; và quan sát output của muxer thay đổi theo cách nào.
+- Vẽ lại pipeline bằng tay, nhấn mạnh đoạn request pad và đoạn static pad.

+Phần khác lesson 02:
 
-- ban co them &#96;nvstreammux&#96;

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="run_terminal_command_v2">
<details><summary>Tool use: **run_terminal_command_v2** • Run command: git commit --trailer "Made-with: Cursor" -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat: Initial DeepStream learning project structure

Add complete DeepStream practice environment with:
- 3 structured lessons (gst_bootstrap, decode_chain, streammux)
- Lesson template with guide, coding_guide, starter.py, extensions, reference
- 10 progressive exercises from basic pipeline to RTSP sources
- Configuration files for primary inference (TrafficCamNet)
- Learning notes covering pipeline flow, inference config, metadata
- Cursor IDE settings for Python/GStreamer development

All lessons include:
- 01_guide.md: Conceptual overview and learning objectives
- 02_coding_guide.md: Step-by-step implementation instructions  
- 03_starter.py: Exercise file for students to complete
- 04_extensions.md: Additional challenges and experiments
- 05_reference.py: Complete working solution

Project follows Nvidia DeepStream SDK best practices with
proper error handling, bus message handling, and pad-based
linking for nvstreammux integration.
EOF
)"</summary>

```bash
git commit --trailer "Made-with: Cursor" -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat: Initial DeepStream learning project structure

Add complete DeepStream practice environment with:
- 3 structured lessons (gst_bootstrap, decode_chain, streammux)
- Lesson template with guide, coding_guide, starter.py, extensions, reference
- 10 progressive exercises from basic pipeline to RTSP sources
- Configuration files for primary inference (TrafficCamNet)
- Learning notes covering pipeline flow, inference config, metadata
- Cursor IDE settings for Python/GStreamer development

All lessons include:
- 01_guide.md: Conceptual overview and learning objectives
- 02_coding_guide.md: Step-by-step implementation instructions  
- 03_starter.py: Exercise file for students to complete
- 04_extensions.md: Additional challenges and experiments
- 05_reference.py: Complete working solution

Project follows Nvidia DeepStream SDK best practices with
proper error handling, bus message handling, and pad-based
linking for nvstreammux integration.
EOF
)"
```
